response.justification: While Bogdan is a highly experienced software engineer with a strong background in full-stack development, low-latency applications, and testing infrastructure, he lacks the critical domain expertise required for this role. There is no evidence of experience with SoC/IP modeling, GPU architectures, hardware-software co-design, or deep-learning workload optimization for AI accelerators.
strengths: Extensive senior-level software engineering experience across web, mobile, and low-latency application development.
Demonstrated ability to work with performance-oriented languages like C, C++, and DLang.
Strong background in test-driven development, CI/CD, and building developer tooling.
concerns: Zero demonstrated experience with System-on-Chip (SoC) and IP modeling or hardware-software co-design.
Lacks required expertise in AI/deep-learning workload optimization and GPU architecture.
No evidence of experience with SIMD/MIMD architectures or cloud infrastructure optimization for AI accelerators.
